C

calcMargin() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow
Calculates the margin for this sale entry (Quantity * (Price - Cost)) and updates the SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow.margin property.
calculateBalanceForAccount(Account, Collection<AccountingEntry>) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.ReportService
Calculates the balance of the provided account using the supplied collection of accounting entries.

Company - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Represents a company, encapsulating all its core data components such as profile information, ledger, chart of accounts, and the associated data file.
